records.ety: [L., a worm that gnaws wood, clothes, etc.; akin to Gr. <?/, L. terere to rub.]

defs: A genus of long, slender, wormlike bivalve mollusks which bore into submerged wood, such as the piles of wharves, bottoms of ships, etc.; -- called also shipworm. See Shipworm. See Illust. in Appendix.
